metadata.description: Skills for managing CARTO Geospatial Cloud resources, analyzing activity data, and building workflows

plugins.name: carto-cli
plugins.description: Manage CARTO Geospatial Cloud resources via CLI: maps, workflows, connections, authentication, and admin operations

plugins.name: carto-activity
plugins.description: Query CARTO activity logs and usage data with SQL for analyzing user behavior, map changes, API usage, and quota monitoring
